text: Have you seen the one who denies the Ë¹finalËº Judgment?
That is the one who repulses the orphan,
and does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
So woe to those Ë¹hypocritesËº who pray
yet are unmindful of their prayers;
and refuse to give Ë¹even the simplestËº aid. <sup foot_note=1331>1331</sup>

foot_notes.1331: They refuse to help others with small things like salt or water, let alone alms-tax.
